About This Project
This project delivers an end-to-end sales analysis for a retail business covering the full 2024 fiscal year. Starting from raw transactional data, the analysis covers executive KPIs, monthly revenue trends, regional performance comparison, product ranking, and customer behavior metrics. The final deliverable is a 5-slide professional presentation ready for management use.
Tools & Technologies
Python + Pandas
Data extraction, cleaning, and transformation pipeline
SQL Server
Data storage, aggregation queries, and reporting views
Power BI
Interactive dashboard with drill-through and slicers
PowerPoint
Executive presentation with charts and KPI cards
